Peters, Ltd., 2000. E. R. Berlekamp and T. Rodgers, Eds., The Mathemagician and Pied Puzzler: A Collection in Tribute to Martin Gardner , Natick, MA: A K Peters, Ltd., 1999. E. R. Berlekamp and D. Wolfe, Mathematical Go: Chilling Gets the Last Point , Wellesley, MA: A K Peters, 1994. E. R. Berlekamp, Algebraic Coding Theory , rev. ed., Laguna Hills, CA: Aegean Park Press, 1984. E. R. Berlekamp, J. H. Conway, and R. K. Guy, Winning Ways for your mathematical plays (Volume 1: Games in General; Volume 2: Games in Particular) , New York: Academic Press, 1982. E. R. Berlekamp, Ed., Key Papers in the Development of Coding Theory , IEEE Press Selected Reprint Series, New York: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers, 1974. E. R. Berlekamp, Algebraic Coding Theory , McGraw-Hill Series in Systems Science, New York: McGraw-Hill, 1968. Book chapters or sections E. R. Berlekamp, " Idempotents among partisan games ," in More Games of No Chance , R. Nowakowski, Ed., Vol. 42, Cambridge, UK: Cambridge University Press, 2001, pp. 1-23. E. R. Berlekamp, "Block coding for the binary symmetric channel with noiseless, delayless feedback," in Error-Correcting Codes , H. B. Mann, Ed., New

Berlekamp, " Idempotents among partisan games ," in More Games of No Chance , R. Nowakowski, Ed., Vol. 42, Cambridge, UK: Cambridge University Press, 2001, pp. 1-23. E. R. Berlekamp, "Block coding for the binary symmetric channel with noiseless, delayless feedback," in Error-Correcting Codes , H. B. Mann, Ed., New York, NY: John Wiley and Sons, Inc., 1968, pp. 61-88. Seroussi, and P. Tong, " Hypersystolic Reed-Solomon decoder ," U.S. Patent 4,958,348. Sep. 1990. P. Tong, E. R. Berlekamp, R. J. Currie, and C. K. Berlekamp, " Soft decision Reed-Solomon decoder ," U.S. Patent 4,821,268.
